data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT pka_mem_newmem.fp_member_name(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as memname ,sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name --,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code) as districtgroup --,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , 0 , 12) district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , 0 , 13) province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , 0 , 14) postcode ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,'12321' as book_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( to_date('2025-9-10 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') , 'DD MONTH YYYY' ) as book_date ,'2' as libery ,'252' as meet ,'' as years , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( to_date('2025-9-10 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') , 'DD MONTH YYYY' ) as meet_date ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_month_name(9) as month -- , sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode as post_code FROM sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE (sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no) -- AND ((sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date = :e_date))
/*---------------------[ วันที่อนุมัติ ]------------------------*/ -- and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date = to_date('2025-9-1 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') /*WHERE*/
